metadata.description: Short slash commands that wrap the Claude Code skills you already use.

plugins.name: rs
plugins.description: Short slash commands aliasing skills and agents you reach for often. /ask is read-only Q&A. /brn is a brainstorm with a recommended execution path. /10x runs product strategy analysis. /trim, /cr, /sec wrap their agents. /hum runs the-humanizer. /jobs channels Steve Jobs. /ui calls ui-ux-pro-max. /polish enforces minimal dashboard design. /std and /prm wrap their respective skills.
